entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: An important staple food crop in drought prone areas of Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region characterized by erratic rainfall with poor distribution

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Poorly distributed rainfall characterizing Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to maintain reasonable yield under drought stress

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress that adversely affects crop productivity

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output or yield of the crop

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: The maintenance of green functional leaves under post-anthesis drought stress

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient affordable nutritious food

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental change caused by human activities that affects tolerance consistency

entities.name: HUMAN ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Actions by humans that cause climate change

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding approaches used to develop drought-tolerant sorghum

entities.name: MOLECULAR TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Modern biological technologies used to develop drought-tolerant sorghum

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing physical traits, which is complex for stay-green in sorghum

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Genetic units that constitute the stay-green trait

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL EFFECTS
entities.description: External factors that influence the expression of the stay-green trait

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: The use of DNA molecular markers to map QTL for trait improvement

entities.name: DNA MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Tools used in marker assisted selection to map QTL

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with the stay-green trait

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying QTL associated with the stay-green trait

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A method for the introgression of QTL into senescent sorghum varieties

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Biological mechanisms contributing to drought tolerance

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical structural mechanisms contributing to drought tolerance

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Chemical mechanisms contributing to drought tolerance

entities.name: QTL PYRAMIDING
entities.description: A technique used to address post-flowering drought by combining multiple QTL

entities.name: POST-FLOWERING DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress occurring after the flowering stage of the crop
